segments.text: Today we are going to worship the Adi Shakti and the reflection of Adisakti within you
is Kundalini.
We can say this is a worship for the Adishakti or Adikundalini, if You understand that
All this, whatever is created on this universe and in many universes
Is the work of the Adi Shakti.
Now may people believe that there's one God
It´s true
There' s One God, God Almighty
But He has His own powers
Which he can embody into someone
and can get his own manifestation expressed.
So first of all he did was to create the power
of Adi Shakti, when it is created then there
a sound that we call as Aum Logos or anything
you called by the primordial sound
And these three powers came out of that sound, is A, U and Ma.
The Arishakti is the one who embodies
desire
God Almighty
The Desire for God Almighty comes
comes out of His compassion and for his own expression,
For is own manifestation.
I would say that he must be tired
Of loneliness so He must have thought
Of creating a partner who will manifest
his desires, thus the power of God Almighty separated from him and formed an embodiment
of His compassion, His desire to create.
They say in Sanskrit they use the word chitvilas
is the enjoyment
of the Adi Shakti
Chid as you know is chitta
is attention
The attention has its own joy
and
To manifest that joy
of her attention, she created all the universes.
She created this Mother Earth
–she created All This Nature
…She created all The Animals
..she created
...all THE human beings
and she created ALL THE Sahaja Yogis
.This is how
....the whole creation has worked out
At this juncture
one may ask that why did she
not straight forward create human beings. That was the idea of God Almighty,
just to create
Human Beings
without telling them
anything something better animals
than
The rest Of the Animals
But Adi Shakti being in mother she had her own way
off expression
that She thought she must create the mirrors for
God Almighty to see His face,
To See his image
and to see His character.
And that's how this long range of evolution took place
This evolution had work out
in a way
because they have known from where it came
We must know we come
From Nature
Even nature should know
It comes
form the Mother Earth
And Mother Earth, Herself has Her own Kundalini and She too is not just a dead earth but she
knows.
Shes thinks ,she understands .And shes regulates
You can see in the nature how every tree
Has got its own limitations
How every fruit
Is produced
In
A particular
Tree
See how it happens, what works out this kind of regulation.
If Mother Earth was moving with a higher speed than today we would not have been born even
– if there had less speed then it wouldn't work at all!
See, the whole plan that was made – it's a beautiful plan
That Mother Earth has to move around The Sun in such manner
different seasons are created.
Thats why the power, the Param Chaitanya
which is also called as Ritambara Pragya
This Is Power that does all living work
All the organization, all the creation in our human ego we start thinking that
We do something.
You can create it
We cannot even create a dust of particle
Leave alone anything else
Whatever is created out of that we may combine,
We can put together and create something.
But if you see
That this whole thing
Is nothing but beyond our any power
You cannot create anything
But what do we create is our myths, I should say.
For example something is made of gold – still it's gold!
Now some thing that has been made out of wood
whatever it was made from
the principle is the same into everything
so whatever may be your birth
whatever may be the country you are born,
what ever maybe your culture
–you're human beings.
Basically all of us are the same
You laugh and smile the way
also cry in a similar manner
I haven't seen anybody crying with his hands
tears falling out from their fingers
And that is how one has to realize
we are all bound by some common principle of life.
The common principle of Life
which is bound us
with the Adi Shakti
it's like,
We have Kundalini within ourselves
All human beings have Kundalini within themselves
It isn't in animals also
but its not so developed
It's not yet what we call is full form of Kundalini that can be awakened, but in the
human form only it has evolved as a connectioned.
As one – That Is The Divine Force within us which is reflection of the Adi-Kundalini
which is so easily awakened in this Kali Yuga.
This the common principle we all have,
So you've to respect
All people
and human beings
whatever nation they come from
Whatever country they belong
What ever colour they are
Because They all
Have their Kundalini
Then there're People as You people are
who are awakened people,
Who are enlightened people
and have got your realization.
So when you understand that
this is the enjoyment of attention
to the Adi Ma
or the Primordial Mother
it's just a play
And then enjoyment
Then
When You've achieved
Your full growth in spirituality
What should happen to you, what should we feel and how do then exist?
This is the question many a times You have asked.
Now when ask questions itself it shows that
We are not there because once You're There
Secondly, what happens to you is that you become just the existence.
Just The Existence and that existence
That You Become then you start reflecting
the character of Divinity
This Divine Character is expressed not only nowadays
also much before in every religion we have had people
who had this divine character, very well developed.
For example even we can say
the people will live three thousand four-thousand years back
in Colombia I found that
In their statues they have Kundalini and a Kumbha also
commonly whatever were founded
they had a Kundalini being expressed three and half coils.
This kundalini we have within ourselves is now proved to you,
You know that there's this power in us also
Now you've come to know what happens when we deviate from the middle path of our ascent.
Here also, this same Kundalini which is an expression for the Primordial Mother tells
You on Your fingertips – What's going wrong with Me?
Where are We lacking?
What is your problem?
So now when we are enlightened people,
We have become saints and
And above all others
what should be do
Is to understand fully well
Not only mentally but from the heart
That you've got these divine vibrations
And these divine vibrations can tell you where are You, what is the problem.
Also it will say wherever I talk to some people who went to Jerusalem and they said Mother
The whole place was just vibrating with spiritual vibrations They went to Chidwara somebody
And he said, I'll find out Mother's place. What is there?
After all it´s not difficult through vibrations i will find her
So He said as soon a touched the platform
and started jumping
Now what to do?
From here only they are vibration
How we reach Mother's Place
so then He sat down
and start wondering now how We found
Where did mother take Her birth
He was sitting down and then he saw the star, which is Venus.
Ah!
And followed the Venus Star – and that's how he found a place to be.
So this whole thing has not done haphazard in any way if you see every tree has leaves
and every leaf is given chance to have the sun's rays.
In nature, if you see it so harmonious
So beautiful! We are ones who spoil
The Nature because we don't understand that
That we've come from Nature
And I already told You many times
About how human beings were formed
By different chemicals
who came, also carbon – came from the Mother Earth.
All this leads us to understand that we have a very big responsibility!
The whole work has taken thousands and thousands of you
And now all your have reached state where
You've become yourself
You know yourself.
This is a very big, I think she say
A Very Big Jump
In the evolutionary process
The Evolutionary Process
Started
Long long time back
Just move it
Moving Is better
Don't fix It
Keep it moving
So, I think it's very important for you to worship the Adi Shakti and the Adikundalini.
Is absolutely without understanding –
Absolutely! You cannot understand how
become a saint. When you will know within yourself,
You have got all these centers and
These centers
Have to be awakened through the awakening of
The Kundalini
And that
The kundalini
Expresses herself
Through your fingertips
Unless and until
You fully identify with this knowledge, there's always a possibility that you'll deviate
from the path of your perfection.
Many people who come to Sahaja Yoga I have seen they meet some sahajogis
are half-way and because they're mentally,
They start arguing how is it this way?
How does it exist in this way.
He's a Sahaja Yogi he behaves like that
There so many ways of people relating
to the power
I've told you at the beginning
That God felt lonely
And that's why He created this Adi Shakti, and through Her the whole universe was created.
But also true is as you are seeking
Also The Divine Is Seeking You
Also, that your seeking is absolutely awarded if you understand the simple thing about Divine.
That it's The One who has given You intelligence!
It Is The one Who Has Given You wisdom!
It is the One which has given you whatever you have as your singing, that
what ever we had was given by You.
If it's a case of all
That you've got is given
By Your Kundalini
By this Mother Power
Then its very important to understand
What is need
Of keeping her happy
and her satisfaction, you must try to see what makes Her happy.
As I said there's a relationship between the realized souls
And The Divine is Happy when You are Happy
or we can say that When The Divine
Makes You Happy
When you are happy, then the Divine is happy.
It's such a relationship and it so close – we can say as
Sun has suns rays or moon has its own moonlight
it. It is so close, its so ingrained ,so much built in and that should give you full control
over yourself an dover your development . They describe
between various ways that You must surrender now one surrenders of course with fear if
somebody comes with a sword and says, all right you surrender.
But as soon that person will disappear he'll take out another sword
And cut his throat – that surrender has no meaning
That surrender is the surrender which just forced on to him
All such surrenders have been creating problems because it
Has reaction
But your surrender to Divine is extremely joy-giving, like a salt which dissolves into
the sea automatically – in to water automatically.
That soluble nature really is joy giving if you can just feel that within yourself
that you are one with the Divine, you're dissolved in the ocean of the Divine.
And then what takes your form is nothing but extreme love and compassion – as a result
extreme joy!
Many people tell Me Mother it's very difficult to forgive someone…but I think its very
horrible not to forgive somebody.
There's a great joy in forgiving, very great joy in forgiving and as soon you forgive the
Divine takes over.
And divine will look after it – nobody can disturb You but first we must surrender to
The Divine that is what is forgiveness just don't bother yourself has to punish somebody
or to do something against somebody, the Divine takes over from you and does whatever is needed.
And in such a beautiful manner that it's worth seeing how It works!
Adi Shaktis power this divine is described In every religion – say Islam called Ruh
In the Bible is called as all-pervading power, it's called as alakh which cannot be seen.
Niranjana –the one that beyond any attachment sort of thing–all these words are used
for this Divine Power people have heard about It and sung About It but unfortunately
very few people felt it. And when they felt,
They didn't know how to give It To Others
How make others feel it? So whatever
they talk became sort of a story or something nonsensical
Nobody could believe that they have felt anything like
Or could imagine there is such power
really existing. Now luckily
it has become quite a universal fact for all of you, that You know there is this power.
We are sure about This Power because we can feel It within yourself and when
When you Feel It ,you feel very joyous .You Can make out whether somebody
Is telling the truth or not
Because you can see on the vibrations,
On this I should say
The power of Adi Shakti.
She tells You a truth
If somebody has done some harm to You
For example
Now
We may said that
Mother if You forgive
That person
Then it's not the truth
because He is definitely harmed
And
And if I forgive that means, I accept he has not harmed me.
This kind of argument is possible now you will see and be surprised because the truth
is whether you forgive or don't forgive,
that's the truth.
So out of compassion if
You forgive someone
compassion becomes
The truth
Is the compassion
That tells you
The truth
So all the absolute truth
That you know
Through the compassion
Of divine power
Maybe, sometimes people say we saw the vibrations Mother and we felt this way
And still it happened. It makes no difference
Whatever has happen is happens doesn't matter
You have felled the vibrations
An you asked the vibrations
an acted upon the vibration
That's all
Whether turned out to be that way or not
Is different
Because
Because it had to be the other way round.
Some drama is going on, that's the chidvilas –is-the enjoyment of Chitta or Divine.
So its a play going around!
If you can see this play then don't get disturbed because It' sa play how it works
and how it is organized, Is not your headache?
You just have to see the play of The Divine, how it works out.
We've seen now all you which we call as miracles that happen
Mother this miracle has happened
That Miracle Has Happened
and I know is also a miracle of The Divine
Despite our faith in The Divine
Is not so much enlightened faith
When you have the enlightened faith,
You don't worry about things which are very important in life.
It works out well and good if it doesn´t work on...
Well..it should not be assumed that once
...you're a realized soul
That whole world can fall at your feet
Not necessarily
It's a play, it is beautiful enjoyment of the attention
So if you can become the witness
If You Can Really Become The Witness Of The Whole Thing
Then What Happens?
You Go Spiritually Much Closer
I Should Say You Get Dissolved Into The Divine Power
That Dissolution Has To Take Place
And that's why todays puja is very important for you, because if it was not Adi Shakti who
had taken an incarnation this work could have been done.
This would be something which encompassed all the angularities of human life and aspects
of this human life. It had to be such an incarnation, that could absolutely see a human being as
whole – not only his physical self mental-self emotional-self or particular ideologies
or his particular domination – no, as a whole.
As human being and human-being is all inside of them are just the same some more sensitive
seeking, genuinely. Some are not seeking genuinely and some
aren't seeking at all but the seeking also is given to you by
Adi Shakti Now it happens that in
evolutionary process one fish came out of the mother
Out from sea which was like a mother
to the sea, came out and then about ten or twelve fishes came up.
Then after some time shawls of fish came in same manner your evolution has worked as it
is we think that you have quite a big number I mean across the numbers what Epikalips had
or we can say it's what Saint John has said,
We have already crossed It.
Doesn't matter!
I doesn' t matter
You see?
iIt seems that
is a very fertile area
Very Fertile time
this Kali Yuga
where there are so many people
who Are taken to divinity
and when Is the right Time
To do This
Yesterday When I saw your play
I've seen all That myself
And I used to wonder what is going happen with these people, how are they taking Sahaja Yoga.
They have taken it and they've taken spirituality!
See all this diverse thing that you see in modern times should not disturb your much
because there has be that way – its a drama ,it's play and the drama will work out
in such a beautiful manner that after some time you'll find nothing but the Divine dissolving
all of these useless things we have, like our conditioning and our ego.
We will so many people in Sahaja Yoga by 2000 years we would have many-many Sahajyogis
all over the world.
Once we have lots of people, many would jump into it – that's human nature also!
You see they won't take to eat till you've got a lot of people and once there is a
multitude then he'll jump in too so some peoples are always worried about what others
do?
We're now in heavens, enjoying life…what about other people?
It will all work out, but your attention should be how I can dissolve others into this ocean
of joy and compassion.
Now you'll be surprised that it is only your own compassion which gives strength
This compassion within yourself when people are getting completely drowned, completely
Your compassion itself will make you powerful, and You'll do everything that is needed.
Will give up all nonsensical activities
And You really dedicate yourself to emancipate other people
Amazingly as we would this your own level of spirituality will rise
As you see, I would say that when You dissolve, say some salt in the water – and then it
rises.
In a same way more people will come to Sahaja Yoga, divine power will manifest much more
than before but there is more manifestation because it will be like so many channels that
will be working it out.
So at this juncture when we are all know that there is divine power, you have got your realization
and now saintly people then should see to the people who were like, like we had Sufis
Then we had Nathpantis, we have Gnostics – all kinds of people in every religion.
What did they do?
They went out to awaken other people that there is divine power and could not give
realization as such but worked it up or sang about it!
That's what we have to understand that nothing should deter your compassion from being expressed.
When you know the people are getting drowned, they're in terrible mess – this is a kind
of huge I shall say onslaught on human beings and if You had that compassion within you
You will go all out to save them, that is what the work of this chidvilas ,of this enjoyment
your attention.
Your attention itself you'll enjoy when we start bringing more people into the power
of Divinity. Without divinity there's no saving for human beings that everybody admits,
every body says so but they have not idea as to what is divinity? What it the way to
achieve It while you all had this power to awaken Kundalini You know about chakras
You know all the defects of the chakras, you can find out from the vibrations
The truth about everything.
The more use this power
better it will be
So we have to go into areas where so far
We haven't got many people
From black race I think
From Africa
So i am thinking going next year
To Africa
Also
Also, we have so many other areas where I find you have to work it out that if this compassion
is within your then will compel also do the work which brings soul as two people who
are not even seeking.
I am already busy with forming some NGOs, you see which will really create very beautiful
institutions for people who have nothing.
They are starving they're under trouble and great audience only You can do it because
Coming to Sahaja Yoga, you have dropped out your greed.
You've dropped off your lust – it's finished!
Now we are so free and independent
With this the compassion cannot take any other form
because many people see that they start these kinds of work
and then they start becoming leaders or they start becoming rich people
Or plundering others. This you will not do
You are really as Christ has said salt
Salt which is completely dissolved in the divinity
And this salt, it's going to dissolve many of us
Once we start spreading out like that
I'm not saying we should be like missionaries or something, converting people into Sahaja
Yoga by force.
No!
We have to look after what they are lacking first of all actually there a very few
in this world who is honest and don't have greed
i've known some people that never had any greed but as soon
As soon as they got some powers, they started showing such tremendous greed that surprisingly
when you know the person who has never done a thing and suddenly find he's become so
greedy.
You can't believe it!
But not Sahaja Yogis – Sahajogis won' t do tht- They'll enjoy their compassion
Not anything else, not their lusts or their greed and also the so-called deviations like
taking to drugs drinking and other nonsensical things because they know what do
They enjoy. Where lies The enjoyment? Once you
Know where lies the enjoyment You will try
to have more of it, and the more is so easy now for you.
I would say as men are working out women should work them because they will get a better sense
of compassion, more sense of compassion and forgiveness.
Normal women – I am not saying about abnormal you know, it should be because they are mothers
who have children that has known what is love for the child yes?
Mother doesn't expect anything she just wants her child to all right happy she
enjoys her child thats'all!
If you are a woman, inbuilt within is this compassion.
See I've seen young girls they too if find little baby
They'll all run after that
.They'd like to take the little babies
,they have dolls and look after
The dolls just as their own children
So for women it should be much easier
To show compassion
And express
and to manifest, it should be.
And as you are all married also
your husbands will feel so much strengthened
by Your own nature of Divinity
What do You sacrifice?
Some say I sacrifice this for God
or I sacrifice that for god
what is there to sacrifice for god
What does God need?
He doesn't need anything.
what is there to sacrifice, only you have sacrificed your brains
that's all I can say
no wisdoms are there
nothing too sacrifice
and if something has tp be done
it should also be done
i've seen some ladies coming to me
mother we had cook
then look after the children
household and this
otherwise
Otherwise what will you do?
The whole day, like the bats which hang themselves.
Are they going to hang yourself?
You have something while doing it is just nothing great
and then sacrifice I don't know
What are we going to sacrifice
Actually what your sacrificing
Is your joy
is your happiness.
If you achieve that state of enjoying
Your own self,
then You'll be never tired
and will always say
Mother we are enjoying everything
This a very important point
That if somebody's woman or man
They have the same thing which we call as Kundalini
But a woman, as it is you know she's mostly left-sided.
She has more power of compassion
in the same way man have more powers action
so that compassion had to become active
In this combination everything will work out
very beautiful manner
but if balance not there
It going be difficult
I've seen most marriages we are having
have been successful.
But some of them had not been, because I think that the women has men and some of the man
having woman . And am really sometimes very unhappy ,I get pain to see unnecessarily
they are creating problems there both sahaja yogis if they were not sahajogies i can understand
If a Sahaja Yogi is married to non-Sahaja Yogi, you can understand but both are Sahajyogis.
Now here we should understand the relationship of
The God Almighty and Adi Shakti
Is complete union
Complete understanding
The god almighty
He's the spectator
he' s watching
work
Of the Adishakti
She is compassion
off course
she doesn't say
that something
should be destroyed or something should be killed, all right – she's compassion.
But he is the one who takes charge if somebody tries to do some thing against Arishakti it
his He Who take charge and changes whole scene in such a manner that we don't understand
how has happened?
How does worked out?"
What you have to do is enjoy the play.
In same manner Sahaja Yogis should have a unison,
Should understand enjoyment among yourselves
If a sahajyogi cannot enjoy who's going
To enjoy life? I can't understand
The one whose Kundalini awakened
Who has felt the all-pervading power of love
Who knows what is the truth, who standing on the complete Oneness with The Divine.
How can such a person anyway have any kind of problem?
It's to realize that you are sitting in the realm of God Almighty!
You have entered into His Kingdom and you are under the attention, compassion of Adishakti.
But it is like this if make a beggar who has been begging all his life sit on throne
he still begs sitting in that throne so sometimes there's such situation with Sahaja Yogis
I receive some funny letters sometime when i start wondering
That this fellow is still in the limbo state, he's not yet Sahaja Yogi nor a human being
between somewhere.
So at least that stage should be overcome by all of you because it has very bad impression
also for other people and your own life – For Your Own Life!
It is very important that you should grow fully into the understanding of
powers, and love your Mother has.
When You say You must surrender yourself to Mother means what?
What do I have to surrender? Just think about it!
What you are surrendering is what is pervert in it, whatever is destructive.
Whatever that misleads you
–whatever your ego and your conditioning–
That's all you're surrendering
just to purify yourself
To enjoy yourselves
And know God Almighty
If You don't Know Yourself how will You know God also?
Impossible!
So, to know yourself you have to evolve.
I now there are some very great Sahaja Yogis – some Sahajyoginis also many of them but
still i would say that their so other areas where all these greatly evolved sahaja yogies
have to enter into and work out.
You can do it, you see I was surprised that in this place when came first in Rome we had
advertised there were not even a single person at the hall so i said Baba what is going
happen in this country.
Now we have so many Sahaja Yogis, unbelievable!
But as it is growing sideways you should also grow upwards and if its going in quantity
which would go into quality – more people will come because I know all the time that
You are so collective that you all the time feel, Mother see my uncle is still not a Sahaja
Yogi.
See mother My brother Is Not Yet A Sahaja Yogi."
I know That feeling you have –that my father Still Is Not A Sahaja Yogi!
So forget about them but those who are seeking approach Them they Are your real
relations then afterwards and All these people will join Your Father, Mother, Brothers
sisters, children – all of them will jump in.
They are that type they'll wait and wait
And we're not seekers
but those who are Seekers you should seek
Them You Should find out
Where my attention is Of course
Is with you
I'm every time think
Of me
I'Ll be at your service fully
Whatever you want
I Will Be there
To help you whichever way is possible
Anything you find very difficult is not because You take it upon yourself, but if
leave to this all-pervading power of Divine love –
To the Power of Adi Shakti Param Chaitanya.
Nothing Is Difficult!
nothing is so bad that you cannot manage
I don't know if have to talk about this Adi Shakti, it will take at least ten hours minimum.
So i think we should stop now and keep something for the next Adishaktipuja
Somebody asked me is necessary that you do any puja in this adisakthi?
It's very important as this puja must be performed because that how
You grow, this reflection improves and you grow more
within yourself through the power of Adi Shakti
or to the Power Of Kundalini.
As we know that Adishakti has her own Kundalini
which is The Adikundalini
And the Reflection of That Within YOU
Is THE KUNDALINI
So you have to worship
& it's best way
To please your own Kundalini
your own mother who has given you this birth.
May God bless You!
